home.video_cta: The DOXA Vision: Click image to watch the video
home.unengaged_description: Our hope is to see each of them covered in 24-hour prayer, and your church can be part of it.
home.simple_path: A simple path to faithful obedience
home.pray_description: Receive daily prayer points and join believers worldwide in prayer for the unengaged peoples.
home.adopt_description: Churches and networks take ownership – praying, giving, and preparing the way for gospel workers.
home.engage_description: God raises up men and women to go, serve, and proclaim Christ among the nations.
home.vision_intro: In partnership with the global church, our vision is for...
home.vision_1: Daily 24-hour prayer coverage for all 2,085 unengaged peoples
home.vision_4: Fruitful engagement among frontier peoples and the under-engaged
home.vision_5: Church planting movements among every unreached people on earth
home.engagement_prayer_description: Every movement of the gospel begins with intercession. Cover an unengaged people group in daily prayer and help prepare the way.
home.doxa_glory: DOXA is the Greek word for "GLORY".
home.doxa_description: We chose this name because Jesus is worthy of glory from every tribe, tongue, people, and nation. DOXA reminds us that we partner with the whole Church to take the whole gospel to the whole world – until people from every nation are worshipping Jesus and He alone receives all the glory.
pray.title: Prayer for an unengaged people group
pray.subtitle: Help prepare the way for gospel engagement through prayer
pray.mobilize_goal: Mobilize 144+ people praying 10 minutes a day for all 2,085 people groups
pray.coverage_status: People groups with committed 24-hour prayer coverage
pray.choose_description: Choose an unengaged people group you will commit to pray for daily.
pray.sign_up_description: Sign up to receive daily prayer points and updates for this people group.
pray.pray_description: Pray for 10 minutes a day and help provide 24-hour prayer coverage.
pray.real_needs: Real prayer needs from the field
pray.key_insights: Key insights about the people group
pray.no_one_praying: They have no one praying for them
pray.no_one_praying_description: Many unengaged people groups have no churches, no missionaries, and often no believers, meaning little to no consistent prayer is being offered on their behalf.
pray.prepares_way: Prayer prepares the way for the gospel
pray.prepares_way_description: Prayer softens hearts, opens doors, and invites the work of the Holy Spirit long before workers arrive or the gospel is proclaimed.
pray.unites_church_description: When we pray, we join believers around the world in God's mission, standing together for peoples still waiting to hear the name of Jesus.
pray.choose_people_group_description: Select a highlighted unengaged people group, or search for a specific group or location below.
pray.harvest_quote: Pray earnestly to the Lord of the harvest ...that He would send laborers to the [Unengaged].
adopt.title: Adopt an unengaged people group
adopt.subtitle: A church-led commitment to pray, give, and send so that gospel access begins
adopt.goal_description: Every unengaged people group adopted by a church committed to prayer, giving, and sending
adopt.choose_description: Prayerfully select an unengaged people group to adopt.
adopt.mobilize_description: Raise up 144+ daily intercessors to pray 10 minutes a day.
adopt.partner_description: Partner through prayer, giving, and sending so that gospel access begins.
adopt.guide_step_by_step: Step-by-step guidance for churches adopting a people group
adopt.guide_tools: Tools to mobilize prayer and participation across your congregation
adopt.guide_printable: Printable and digital resources to promote awareness and engagement
adopt.guide_tips: Helpful tips for sustaining long-term commitment
adopt.no_gospel_access_description: Unengaged people groups have no missionaries, no churches, and often no known believers. Adoption helps ensure they are finally seen, prayed for, and intentionally pursued with the gospel.
adopt.prayer_opens_door: Prayer opens the door for engagement
adopt.prayer_opens_door_description: Adoption mobilizes 144+ daily intercessors, creating 24 hours of prayer that prepares the soil, breaks spiritual barriers, and supports workers who go. Every gospel movement begins with prayer.
adopt.churches_partners: Churches become active partners in God's mission
adopt.churches_partners_description: Adoption invites the local church into meaningful participation - praying, giving, and sending – so that a people group moves from unengaged to engaged, and ultimately becomes a worshipping community for Jesus.
adopt.choose_people_group_description: Select a highlighted unengaged people group, or search for a specific group or location below.
adopt.stranger_quote: I was a stranger and you invited me in.
adoption_form.title: Adoption Form
adoption_form.commitment_heading: What is your commitment? Pray. Give. Send.
adoption_form.commitment_intro: When you adopt a people group, you step into a leadership role on their behalf—standing in the gap until the gospel takes root. This involves a commitment to:
adoption_form.pray_description: Mobilize toward the goal of at least 144 prayer partners to cover the people group in continuous, daily prayer (10 minutes each, 24 hours a day).
adoption_form.give_description: Partner financially on a monthly basis with the Doxa Foundation to help sustain prayer mobilization, campaign operations, and the sending of gospel workers.
adoption_form.give_recommendation: We recommend that churches give a monthly pledge based on their congregational size.  i.e. $100 a month for a congregation around 100.  $500 a month for a congregation around 500. $1000 a month for a congregation around 1000, etc.
adoption_form.send_description: Actively help surface and support potential goers, encouraging those God may be calling to cross cultures and serve this people group directly.
adoption_form.champion_description: The Champion is the person who will organize the 144 intercessors and receive updates.
adoption_form.role_placeholder: Example: Pastor, Missions Pastor, Elder, Volunteer Leader etc.
adoption_form.public_consent: I am happy for this church name to appear publicly on this site.
adoption_form.adoption_commitment: I/my church/group commits to adopting this People Group for prayer, partnership and support.
adoption_form.connect_permission: I give permission for DOXA to connect me with others adopting this people group.
adoption_form.success: Thank you for your adoption commitment! We will be in touch soon.
adoption_form.error: There was an error submitting your adoption. Please try again.
adoption_form.needs_verification: Thank you! Please check your email to verify your address and complete your adoption commitment.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you soon!
contact.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.
uupg.people_group_not_found_description: The people group you are looking for could not be found. Please try again.
uupg.churches_adopted: churches / individuals have adopted this people group
error.not_found_description: It looks like nothing was found at this location. Perhaps one of the links below can help.
